name: VTIL_GetDisplayedValue
title: VTIL_GetDisplayedValue
syntax: long VTIL_GetDisplayedValue(dbNode workingSetMaster, dword objectId, double & value); // form 1
description: Returns the displayed value of an object.
If the object supports scaling/offset then the displayed value is
If the object uses a variable reference then the value of this reference is used to calculate the displayed value.
For Input String and Output String objects you can use form 3 and 4.

parameters.name: vt
parameters.description: VT simulation node to apply the function
